hero.title: Where Crown & Culture Meet the Chair
hero.lead: Jack's Barber Style is a home for afro-textured hair — sharp fades, shaped afros, clean line-ups, and styles rooted in African barbering tradition.

roots.label: Sankofa · Look Back, Move Forward
roots.title: Our Roots
paragraphs: In many African communities, the barbershop is more than a place to get a haircut — it's a gathering space, a storyteller's corner, and a seat where identity is shaped with every pass of the clippers.

At Jack's Barber Style in Wodonga, we carry that spirit. Whether you're after a crisp skin fade, a perfectly shaped afro, twists, or a custom hair design, our barbers work with your natural texture — not against it.
roots.quote: Your hair tells a story. We help you write the next chapter.

services.name: Afro Cut
services.description: Shape cutting and afro combing for natural volume and texture.

services.name: Skin Fade
services.description: Seamless gradient from skin to length.

services.name: Taper Fade
services.description: Clean taper blended into your top.

services.name: Scissor Cut
services.description: Layers and movement on textured hair.

services.name: Twists & Retwist
services.description: Neat twists for locs or starter coils.

services.name: Beard Trim & Shape
services.description: Sculpted beard lines that frame your face.

services.name: Blade Line-Up
services.description: Hot towel and cut-throat crisp edges.

homeService.label: We Come to You
homeService.title: Home Service Haircut
homeService.lead: Enjoy professional grooming from the comfort of your home. Select Home Service when booking, choose your date and time, and we'll come to you.
steps: Select Home Service on the booking form
Choose your service, date, and time
Enter your home address and confirm payment terms
We'll arrive at your scheduled appointment
homeService.serviceArea: Wodonga and surrounding areas (within 15 km of the shop)
homeService.coverageNote: A travel fee applies to all home service bookings. Extra charges may apply for locations outside our standard service area.
homeService.parkingNote: Please ensure parking is available at your address. Paid parking costs may be added to your booking where required.
